channel.title: GNartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Polarizing Hollywood Actor Continues to Defy Audience Expectations
Highly Rated Taylor Sheridan Western Leaving Netflix in Seven Days
Netflix Action Series Draws Comparisons to Genre Classics While Subverting Conventions
FBI Director Kash Patel Acknowledged Two Prior Alcohol-Related Arrests
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel, who is suing over allegations of on-the-job intoxication, previously acknowledged two separate arrests related to alcohol, according to reports.

item.title: Cher's Son Elijah Blue Allman Entering Treatment Amid Ongoing Legal Battle
item.description: Elijah Blue Allman is entering a residential treatment facility following recent arrests, while his dispute with his mother Cher over a legal matter continues.
